- `[04:30]` **🔥In-vivo | Strand Therapeutics 将在第 29 届美国基因与细胞治疗学会 (ASGCT) 年会上展示其可编程 mRNA In Vivo CAR-T 平台的临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Strand Therapeutics to Present Preclinical Data on Its Programmable mRNA In Vivo CAR-T Platform at the 29th American Society of Gene & Cell Therapy (ASGCT) Annual Meeting* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[04:30]` **🔥In-vivo | Sail Biomedicines 将在 ASGCT 2026 和 TIDES USA 2026 上向临床展示支持其 In Vivo eRNA™ CAR-T 产品候选方案进展的临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Sail Biomedicines to Present Preclinical Data Supporting Advancement of Its In Vivo eRNA™ CAR-T Product Candidate to the Clinic at ASGCT 2026 and TIDES USA 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
- `[04:30]` **Tr1X 将在 ASGCT 2026 上展示工程化 Tr1 Treg 细胞疗法的新临床和临床前数据**
  <br><small>🇬🇧 *Tr1X to Present New Clinical and Preclinical Data on Engineered Tr1 Treg Cell Therapies at ASGCT 2026* [🔗Source](https://news.google.?oc=5)</small>
